events_scope_shape_check.name: events_scope_shape_check
events_scope_shape_check.value:
(
        ("events"."scope_kind" = 'turn' AND "events"."turn_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR
        ("events"."scope_kind" = 'thread' AND "events"."turn_id" IS NULL)
      )

project_sources_shape_check.name: project_sources_shape_check
